caption: A man wearing a white shirt, a red bowtie, tan suspenders, and a tall, grey, textured wig sits in a studio setting. He wears glasses and black over-ear headphones. In front of him is a black microphone. The background consists of a wall covered in framed photos and various pieces of clothing on racks. On-screen graphics appear on the left and right sides of the frame, featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". As the sequence progresses, the man gestures with his right hand, raising it toward his face and moving it slightly as he speaks. His facial expression remains focused, and his mouth moves, indicating he is talking during the recording. The camera angle and the studio environment remain static throughout the clip.
